title: Khonshu
content:
{{CharHub|Khonshu|Khonshu}} {{Character |image = Khonshu.png |real name = Khonshu (ḫnsw) |alias = {{Alias |undercover = [[Marc Spector]]{{Ref|MK103}}}} |species = [[Ennead]] |gender = Male |title = God of the [[Moon]]{{Ref|MK103}}
God of the Night Sky{{Ref|MK106}} |affiliation = [[Ennead Council]] (formerly) |tv series = ''[[Moon Knight (TV series)|Moon Knight]]'' (5 episodes) |actor = [[Karim El-Hakim]] (on-set actor)
[[Oscar Isaac]] (in [[Marc Spector]]'s body) |voice actor = [[F. Murray Abraham]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|I only punish those who have already done harm. I am real justice!|Khonshu|Summon the Suit}} '''Khonshu''' (Ancient Egyptian: '''ḫnsw''')Translates from Ancient Egyptian to "''Traveler''." is the [[Egypt]]ian God of the [[Moon]] and the Night Sky. Banished by the [[Ennead Council]], he sought to avenge those that had been wronged by evildoers through his Avatars who were known as Moon Knights. Due to the betrayal of [[Arthur Harrow]], his former Avatar who had chosen to follow the goddess [[Ammit]], whose views were different than Khonshu's, Khonshu chose [[Marc Spector]] to be his new Avatar. Khonshu planned on preventing Harrow from resurrecting Ammit, but eventually failed despite working with both Spector and [[Steven Grant]]. He was briefly imprisoned by the Ennead Council, only to be released later by [[Layla El-Faouly]] so he could face Ammit himself. In the aftermath of the defeat of Harrow and Ammit, Spector and Grant believed themselves free of Khonshu, as they were ignorant that another alter inhabiting the same body, [[Jake Lockley]], would carry on Khonshu's will as his Avatar. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====God of the Moon==== {{Quote|[[Hathor|She]] says it was not so long ago Khonshu enjoyed Hathor's melodies.|[[Yatzil]] to [[Marc Spector]]|The Friendly Type}} Khonshu maintained a close relationship with fellow [[Ennead]] [[Hathor]] and often enjoyed listening to her music. Whenever Khonshu chose an Avatar, he gifted them with [[Moon Knight's Suit]] and [[Crescent Darts]] so that they could operate as the vigilante Moon Knight, serving Khonshu's fatal justice upon criminals. The [[Ennead Council]] banished Khonshu for his continued interactions with [[Humans|humanity]]. Khonshu came to hate the Council for abandoning the human race, and the Council despised Khonshu's theatrics, such as his ceremonial armor and weapons he gifted to his Avatars. While the other gods chose not to interact with humanity, Khonshu continued to do so.{{Ref|MK103}} ====Choosing Moon Knights==== {{Quote|Do you swear to protect the travelers of the night and bring my vengeance to those who would do them harm?"
"Yes"
"Then rise. Rise and live again. As my fist of vengeance. As my Moon Knight.|Khonshu and [[Marc Spector]]|Asylum}} Khonshu met [[Arthur Harrow]] and made a deal with him to be his avatar. However, after Harrow became interested in [[Ammit]], Khonshu separated from him and they became enemies.{{Ref|MK102}} [[File:Moon Knight & Khonshu.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu grants Marc Spector the Moon Knight suit]] In [[2022]], Khonshu met Marc Spector when Spector was on the grounds of his [[Khonshu's Temple|temple]] and was about to shoot himself. Khonshu intervened by saying it would be a waste for Spector to just die and offered him a choice to live and become his fist of vengeance and protect the travelers of the night. Khonshu then made Spector swear the oath to become Khonshu's avatar, which Spector then took. Khonshu then told Spector to rise and granted Spector the title, Moon Knight.{{Ref|MK105}} ===Annoyed by Steven Grant=== ====Chase at the Alps==== [[File:Moon Knight Big Game TV Spot (1).png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu's presence is detected by [[Steven Grant]]]] {{Quote|I don't know what I'm doing."
"Then, leave [[Marc Spector|us]] be, parasite!|[[Steven Grant]] and Khonshu|The Goldfish Problem}} In [[2025]], Khonshu learned that [[Arthur Harrow]] and the [[Disciples of Ammit]] were plotting to release [[Ammit]]. Khonshu worked with [[Marc Spector]] to [[Theft of the Scarab of Ammit|steal]] the [[Scarab of Ammit]] from Harrow. However, [[Steven Grant]] began fronting in his body, frustrating Khonshu. Khonshu demanded that he allowed Spector to front, confusing Grant. Grant ran from the people firing at him and found a service being led by Harrow. Harrow recognized Grant as Spector and demanded the scarab be returned. Unaware of its importance, Grant prepared to hand the scarab over, despite Khonshu demanding that he not. Khonshu took control of Grant's body and locked his hand shut, but Grant managed to pry it open. Grant prepared to give Harrow the scarab, but Khonshu moved Grant's hand away from Harrow and began making Grant walk away. However, Grant was grabbed by Harrow's disciples, who attempted to retrieve the scarab. Spector momentarily fronted and killed his attackers, before Grant resumed control and Khonshu told Grant not to drop it. As Grant fled, Spector momentarily fronted for moments at a time to kill the people chasing them. The moment Grant resumed control, Khonshu demanded Spector wake up fully, threatening to kill the both of them if Grant were to lose the scarab, before alerting him to an oncoming truck. Subsequently, after Spector fronted and saved Grant again, leaving himself driving backwards with a broken windshield, and threw his gun at an oncoming truck, Khonshu scolded Grant for the decision, and Grant responded that he does not know what he is doing. Khonshu replied by demanding that he leave them alone.{{Ref|MK101}} ====Scaring Steven Grant==== [[File:Khonshu approaches Steven Grant.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu scares [[Steven Grant]]]] [[Steven Grant]] returned to his [[Steven Grant's Apartment|apartment]] and called [[Layla El-Faouly]] using [[Marc Spector]]'s phone, but El-Faouly hung up on him. Spector warned Grant not to call again as the lights in his apartment started flickering. Grant ran into the elevator out of fear, and Khonshu appeared to Grant as the elevator door opened. Khonshu approached Grant and held the elevator door open, but when Grant looked again, he saw a woman asking for the door to be kept open. After the woman left the elevator, Grant turned around and suddenly saw Khonshu, terrifying Grant and causing another alter to front. [[File:KhonshuInLondon.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu watches [[Steven Grant]]]] Grant later fronted again while on a bus, and Khonshu appeared to him in front of a bank and disappeared.{{Ref|MK101}} ====Confronting Steven Grant==== [[File:Khonshu (CLS).png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu confronts [[Steven Grant]] at the [[Central London Storage]]]] {{Quote|Give it back, you fool.|Khonshu to [[Steven Grant]]|Summon the Suit}} [[Steven Grant]] later threatened to get rid of Spector, Khonshu appeared to him in the [[Central London Storage]] to try and stop him from leaving, but failed after he ran out of the building he was in.{{Ref|MK102}} ====Watching Steven Grant==== [[File:Khonshu perching.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu observes [[Steven Grant]] and [[Arthur Harrow]]]] Later on, after [[Steven Grant]] was captured by [[Arthur Harrow]] and the [[Disciples of Ammit]], Khonshu followed them and repeatedly told Grant to kill Harrow, but Harrow noticed Khonshu was near and told Grant to ignore him. Khonshu wasn't able to intervene, so he was forced to watch Harrow speak with Grant. [[File:I am real justice.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu declares that he is real justice]] When Grant was having dinner with Harrow and were talking about [[Ammit]]'s justice, Khonshu watched and told him he was real justice. When Grant was knocked out of a second floor window by a [[Jackals|jackal]], Khonshu angrily demanded him to summon the suit.{{Ref|MK102}} ===Conflict Against Arthur Harrow=== ====Speaking with Marc Spector==== [[File:Khonshu and Marc Spector.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu speaks to [[Moon Knight|Marc Spector]]]] After [[Marc Spector]] killed the jackal and screamed [[Steven Grant]] away, Khonshu appeared to him once again heralded by a gust of wind that scattered the chairs in the square. Khonshu appeared on a rooftop, frustrated that Grant had interfered despite Spector's assurance that he wouldn't. Khonshu called Spector ungrateful, neglecting all the gifts he had given him and that he would be nothing without him. Spector wanted assurance that slaying Harrow would be his last mission, though Khonshu noted that his next candidate would be close to Spector's heart. Wanting to protect [[Layla El-Faouly]], Spector agreed to Khonshu's terms, and the pair traveled to [[Egypt]].{{Ref|MK102}} ====Sending a Signal==== [[File:Marc-and-Khonshu-Moon-Knight-Episode-3.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu speaks with [[Marc Spector]] in [[Cairo]]]] Khonshu urged [[Marc Spector]] to take one of Harrow's [[Disciples of Ammit|disciples]] to a ledge when he refused to talk. However, when Spector did so, the disciple committed suicide instead. Khonshu, bemused noted that he thought he would talk. Spector then asked Khonshu about the other gods and whether they would let Harrow unleash Ammit. Khonshu noted that summoning the gods would risk their wrath and that would land him sealed in stone. Despite this, Khonshu said he had a bad idea to get the attention of the gods, vanishing. The [[Moon]] then began to eclipse the [[Sun]], a signal the gods would not be able to ignore. [[File:Khonshu speaks with Marc.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu tells [[Marc Spector]] about the [[Ennead Council]]]] With the global event calling the gods to action, Khonshu met Spector in the streets and told him that a [[Wormhole|portal]] would open up for all those called to the [[Ennead Council]]'s meeting. He then pointed to one that was opening up behind Spector. When Spector asked where Khonshu was going, as he was walking away, he told him he would be there.{{Ref|MK103}} ====Arthur Harrow's Trial==== [[File:Khonshu speaks through his Avatar.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu speaks through [[Marc Spector]] to the [[Ennead Council]]]] Once inside the [[Great Pyramid of Giza]] and the [[Ennead]] assembled, Khonshu possessed [[Marc Spector]] to talk through him to the Ennead. He told them that he wished to have a trial regarding [[Arthur Harrow]] wanting to awake [[Ammit]]. When Harrow was summoned, he rebutted the accusation, much to Khonshu's frustration. At one point, he tried to punch Harrow, but was stopped by [[Osiris]]. Harrow proceeded to tell the Ennead that Khonshu's avatar was not well, and [[Horus]] told Khonshu to leave Spector so they could talk to him.{{Ref|MK103}} ====Ticking Clock==== [[File:Khonshu of Egypt.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu reminds [[Marc Spector]] of the mission]] Khonshu appeared to [[Marc Spector]] again when he reunited with [[Layla El-Faouly]], watching events proceed. His presence caused Spector to usher El-Faouly away. Later, when confronted by Harrow and [[Anton Mogart]], Khonshu urged Spector to summon the suit. Eventually he did, fighting off Mogart and his men. Afterwards, Khonshu reminded Spector that time was ticking to complete their mission.{{Ref|MK103}} ====Sealed Away==== [[File:Moon Knight Promo Spot (4).png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu helps [[Steven Grant]] turn back the night sky]] Khonshu reappeared when [[Marc Spector]] and [[Layla El-Faouly]] were in route to find the tomb. When El-Faouly requested that Spector let [[Steven Grant]] front, Khonshu agreed and pushed Spector to change. When Grant fronted, Khonshu told him that he remembered the night that [[Ammit]] was locked away. Doing this, Khonshu knew that he would be punished by the [[Ennead]] and told Grant to copy his hand movements. He also told him that Spector would be able to free him. As Khonshu manipulated the sky to the exact night, he slowly disintegrated as he was turned to [[Khonshu's Ushabti|stone]] by the Ennead's spell.{{Ref|MK103}} ===Liberated=== ====[[Battle of Giza|Fighting Ammit]]==== [[File:Khonshu's ushabti.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu imprisoned within his ushabti]] {{Quote|Why fight, knowing you will fail?"
"Because it is my choice. The very thing you take away.|[[Ammit]] and Khonshu|Gods and Monsters}} Khonshu was soon freed by [[Layla El-Faouly]]. He thanked her before realizing that he could not sense [[Marc Spector]] in the world, realizing he was dead. He immediately asked El-Faouly to be his avatar, but she refused. He then teleported away to fight [[Ammit]]. [[File:Khonshu battles Ammit.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu battles [[Ammit]] inside the [[Great Pyramid of Giza|pyramid]]]] He arrived in the pyramid and talked with Ammit about their differences, although [[Arthur Harrow]] warned Ammit about his deception. Ammit and Khonshu then started a fight, but Khonshu was easily overpowered. While fighting, he suddenly felt Spector's presence and teleported away, healing Spector who had returned from the [[Duat]]. [[File:Khonshu vs. Ammit.png|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu fights [[Ammit]] at giant size]] He met with Spector outside of [[Cairo]]. Much to Khonshu's surprise, Spector wanted to renegotiate their deal. When Khonshu said that now was not the best time, [[Steven Grant]] emerged, agreeing with Spector. Khonshu then promised to release them both after they were done. They then went to Cairo. As Moon Knight fought Harrow, Khonshu fought Ammit. Khonshu grew to an enormous size, but was not able to overpower the strong Ammit. Suddenly, Ammit started disintegrating. Realizing that Spector and El-Faouly had trapped Ammit inside of Harrow, Khonshu told Spector to kill them. However, Spector listened to El-Faouly and refused. He said that Khonshu could not control him and they needed to be freed. Khonshu cut his loses and freed them.{{Ref|MK106}} ====[[Assassination of Arthur Harrow|Tying Up Loose Ends]]==== [[File:Khonshu in the limo.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Khonshu talks to Harrow before killing him]] {{Quote|[[Marc Spector]] truly believed that after he and I parted ways, I wanted his [[Layla El-Faouly|wife]] to be my Avatar. Why would I ever need anybody else when he has no idea how troubled he truly is? Meet my friend, [[Jake Lockley]].|Khonshu to [[Arthur Harrow]]|Gods and Monsters}} During the aftermath of the battle, a crippled [[Arthur Harrow]] was abducted from a psychiatric hospital. After meeting Harrow, Khonshu explained that he never wanted Spector's wife as his future Avatar, saying that he would never need anybody else when Spector had no idea how troubled he is, later introducing him to [[Jake Lockley]], Spector's third alter. Lockley then killed [[Ammit]] and Harrow. Khonshu did not break his promise as he promised to free them both, not the hidden third alter.{{Ref|MK106}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Expand}} {{Quote|I can turn back the night sky.|Khonshu to [[Steven Grant]]|The Friendly Type}} *'''Ennead Physiology''': Khonshu is both an Ennead and the God of the Moon, so he possesses many godlike powers and abilities. **'''Superhuman Strength''': ''To be added'' **'''Superhuman Durability''': ''To be added'' **'''Superhuman Speed''': ''To be added'' **'''Superhuman Agility''': ''To be added'' **'''Superhuman Stamina''': ''To be added'' **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': ''To be added'' **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': ''To be added'' **'''Immortality''': As an Ennead, is extremely long-lived and is immune to disease and aging. However, it was noted by [[Ammit]] that time seemingly had some effect on him, which was admitted by Khonshu himself. **'''Lunar Manipulation''': Khonshu is able to manipulate objects made out of moonrocks. He causes a solar eclipse in order to call a meeting with the [[Ennead Council]]. **'''Sky Manipulation''': [[File:Moon Knight Promo Spot (4).png|thumb|250px|Khonshu changing the night sky]] Khonshu, with the help of [[Mr. Knight]], was able to manipulate the night sky to reveal what the stars had looked like 2,000 prior. When Khonshu alters the night sky, the stars appear to be spinning so fast they become blurred lines. **'''Teleportation''': [[File:Khonshu disappears.png|thumb|250px|Khonshu teleporting away]]Khonshu is capable of teleportation, disappearing and reappearing at will, often while in conversation to remain near his Avatar. This power applies on long distance, as he instantly teleported to [[Marc Spector]] upon sensing his presence back into the [[Earth|Earthly Plane]] in the middle of a fight against Ammit. **'''Power Bestowal''': Khonshu can grant his Avatar superhuman abilities, as well as a ceremonial armor from his [[Khonshu's Temple|temple]] and weapons to go along side it. This armor is changeable however, as Steven Grant was able to turn it into a second design. **'''Telepathy''': Khonshu was able to communicate with his Avatar even while not physically manifested. **'''Remote Possession''': [[File:Khonshu possesses Marc Spector.png|thumb|250px|Khonshu possessing [[Marc Spector]]]]Khonshu could possess his Avatar in order to speak directly to the [[Ennead Council]], as shown when he possessed Marc Spector to defend himself when he was summoned by the Ennead Council to talk about Arthur Harrow and Ammit. **'''Telekinesis''': Khonshu could move objects with his mind, though he could not deal lasting serious damage to any area. **'''Smoke Mimicry''': Khonshu can turn his body into smoke. He uses this to move quickly and escape from harm. **'''Electricity Manipulation''': Khonshu could cause lights to flicker while appearing or using his other powers. **'''Wind Manipulation''': Khonshu was able to create intense wind storms in a small area. However, these storms could not do any lasting damage. **'''Size Manipulation''': In preparation for his duel against [[Ammit]], Khonshu was able to increase his size so it would match Ammit's after she absorbed the souls of those that had been punished by her [[Disciples of Ammit|disciples]]. Khonshu later returned to his regular size once Ammit was defeated. **'''Adaptive Appearance''': Khonshu has the ability to change his appearance. Although he has a default form he chooses, Khonshu changed it to appear to be wearing suit while [[Jake Lockley]] [[Assassination of Arthur Harrow|killed]] [[Arthur Harrow]]. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|I remember that night. I remember every night.|Khonshu to [[Steven Grant]]|The Friendly Type}} *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': Khonshu has a photographic memory and perfect recall, which enables him to remember every night sky across the span of history on Earth. Khonshu was able to recall the night that [[Ammit]] was locked away, which was thousands of years ago, showing that his intellect is so high that he can remember events that happened millennia ago. *'''Master Combatant''': [[File:Khonshu vs. Ammit.png|thumb|250px|Khonshu fighting against [[Ammit]]]] Although Khonshu doesn't usually participates in fights, he is shown to be a highly skilled fighter, particularly against other gods like Ammit. *'''Staff Mastery''': Khonshu skillfully used his staff as a weapon in his fight against Ammit, striking her multiple times. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Khonshu's Staff|Staff]]''': Khonshu wields a crescent moon staff, which he can use as a weapon in battle like he did during his duel against [[Ammit]]. The staff can be summoned back into Khonshu's hands should he lose his grip on it. ==Facilities== *'''[[Khonshu's Temple]]''': [[File:Khonshu's Temple.png|thumb|250px|Khonshu's Temple]] Before he made [[Marc Spector]] his Avatar, Khonshu resided within his own temple, waiting for a new Avatar after he was separated from [[Arthur Harrow]]. ===Prisons=== *'''[[Khonshu's Ushabti]]''': Khonshu was imprisoned in an ushabti for turning back the night sky in order to find the location of the [[Tomb of Alexander the Great]]. He was later freed by [[Layla El-Faouly]]. ==Relationships== {{col-begin}}{{col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Ra]] - Adoptive Father *[[Sekhmet]] - Half-Sister *[[Hathor]] - Half-Sister *[[Bast]] - Half-Sister *[[Tefnut]] - Half-Sister *[[Isis]] - Great-Niece *[[Osiris]] - Grand-Nephew *[[Horus]] - Great-Grand-Nephew ===Allies=== *[[Moon Knight|Marc Spector/Moon Knight]] / [[Mr. Knight|Steven Grant/Mr. Knight]] / [[Jake Lockley]] - Avatar *[[Scarlet Scarab|Layla El-Faouly/Scarlet Scarab]] {{col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Ammit]] † - Attempted Killer *[[Disciples of Ammit]] **[[Arthur Harrow]] † - Former Avatar **[[Bobbi Kennedy]] {{col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|MK105}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|MK101}} *{{Appearance|MK102}} *{{Appearance|MK103}} **{{Appearance|MK105}} (flashbacks; concurrent events) *{{Appearance|MK104}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|MK105}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|MK106}} ==Trivia== *In Egyptian mythology, Khonshu was a god of healing and fertility as well as the moon. However, travelers did pray to him for protection during the night, just as the character Khonshu charges Marc to do. **The character Khonshu is shown to heal mortal injuries, at least those inflicted upon his Avatar. *In the comics, '''Chons''', commonly known as '''Khonshu''', was a member of the Heliopolitan pantheon of gods worshiped in Ancient Egypt. Alternatively, he was said to be an Elder God predating the age of [[Earth]], becoming a myth circulating ancient Egyptian times. He resurrected [[Marc Spector]], granting him abilities under the moon, hence Spector's alias being Moon Knight. **He is also the half-brother of [[Bast]] and [[Sekhmet]]. ==References== {{Gallery|Khonshu/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Khonshu (Marvel Comics)|Khonshu}} [[es:Khonshu]] [[pt-br:Khonshu]] [[ru:Хонсу]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Moon Knight (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Ennead]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:No Eyes]] [[Category:Ennead Council Members]] [[Category:Gods]]

infobox.title:
God of the [[Moon]]{{Ref|MK103}}
God of the Night Sky{{Ref|MK106
